zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Bostock於1060年出生在英國英格蘭爾保斯托時，他的父親Hugh de Bostock Sir15歲，母親Joan Delheath15歲。他於1084年與Margery Higgenson在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1138年享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Bostock于1060年出生在英国英格兰爾保斯托时，他的父亲Hugh de Bostock Sir15岁，母亲Joan Delheath15岁。他于1084年与Margery Higgenson在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1138年享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bostock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Bostock in Cheshire (Botestoch in Domesday Book), so named with an Old English personal name Bōta (see Bott ) + Old English stoc ‘place’.

variants.name: Bostwick
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northwestern England perhaps a variant of Bostock , and in southeastern England a variant of Bastick (see Bostick 1) with rounding of the vowel.

variants.name: Bott
meanings: English: nickname from Old French bot ‘toad’ (compare Bottrell ). Alternatively, from the Middle English personal name Botte (a survival of Old English Botta). Compare Botting .
South German: occupational name for a messenger, from Middle High German bote ‘messenger, emissary’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Bostock was born in 1060, in Bostock, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh de Bostock Sir, was 15 and his mother, Joan Delheath, was 15. He married Margery Higgenson in 1084, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1138, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Bostock est né en 1060, à Bostock, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh de Bostock Sir, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Joan Delheath, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Margery Higgenson en 1084, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1138, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Bostock 1060 in Bostock, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Bostock Sir 15 und seine Mutter Joan Delheath 15. Er hat 1084 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Margery Higgenson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1138 im Alter von 78 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Bostock è nato il nel 1060 nel Bostock, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hugh de Bostock Sir, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Joan Delheath, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Margery Higgenson nel 1084, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1138, all'età di 78 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Bostock(이)가 1060년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 보스톡에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Bostock Sir(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Delheath(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1084년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Margery Higgenson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1138년 78세의 나이로 사망했다.
